task_description: Phase 18: AI Agent Swarm + Autonomous Device Control. Create @quant/agent-runtime package with core orchestration framework, 3-tier device control, 12 pre-built pilot agents, agent marketplace, and Agent Dock UI components in shared-ui.

verification.summary: All 1900 tests pass across 203 test files. TypeScript strict compilation passes. Semantic review v2 APPROVED. Safety mechanisms wired in: sandbox gates execution, kill switch enforces 500ms timeout, orchestrator uses defaultPermission as floor, approval queue records high-risk actions, conflict resolver acquires locks during dispatch.
